subcodes.title: Words to pilgrims, spoken on 1914-06-10
subcodes.first_line: This is the lake around which His Holiness Christ often walked, over which He often sailed. The site wherein He called His apostles into active service is very near.
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
